evals.prompt: How do I add structured logging in Spring Boot?
evals.expected_output: Use Logback with JSON encoder (logstash-logback-encoder) or Micrometer Logging. Use SLF4J API with LoggerFactory. Include MDC for correlation IDs. Never use System.out.println.

evals.prompt: How do I expose Prometheus metrics from Spring Boot?
evals.expected_output: Add micrometer-registry-prometheus dependency. Expose /actuator/prometheus endpoint. Configure management.endpoints.web.exposure.include=prometheus,health. Use MeterRegistry for custom metrics.

evals.prompt: How do I set up distributed tracing in Spring Boot?
evals.expected_output: Add spring-boot-starter-actuator and micrometer-tracing-bridge-otel with opentelemetry-exporter-zipkin/jaeger. Spring Boot 3 auto-configures trace propagation via Micrometer Tracing.

should_not_trigger: How do I add logging in NestJS?
How do I monitor a Go service?
How do I implement Spring Security?
